title: マイルCS南部杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (The qi... it's responding. Okay, then...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (My dream is for us to grow stronger together in harmony, despite our differences.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The stronger my desire to make people happy
with feng shui becomes...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The stronger her desire to make the people of
her hometown happy will grow, too.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (Because that's the Hokko Tarumae I know.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She would never abandon her hometown, even if
it killed her!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae shows up to the racecourse, after
seven months away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's trembling. A little jittery. But she's here.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I had to come back.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I felt that... from the start. But my legs wouldn't
move...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Then, seeing you, Rickey, all covered in dirt...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: It made me think... I can't lose. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I wanted to come back... no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I don't get out there and run for
Tomakomai's happiness, who will?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I get knocked down,
I'll get right back up! That's the Tomakomai spirit!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna give it another shot! Because I'm
Tomakomai born and bred...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae, the dauntless fairy! And I'll give
it all I've got for the people I care about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae has finally made her comeback.
Now, the dirt races of the Twinkle Series are sure
to heat up to levels never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know you probably won't be in top form, since
you were away for so long. Even still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I won't hold back! ♪ I'll make you feel my passion!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In Tohoku, with the leaves showing just hints of
red... fall begins for Copano Rickey and Hokko
Tarumae.
